name: qto-tool
description: Zeconic QTO Extraction Tool — PyQt6 desktop app that extracts Quantity Takeoff line items from architectural PDFs and exports to a GC estimate Excel template.

scripts.clean: rm -rf output cache __pycache__ .pytest_cache && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -prune -exec rm -rf {} +

author: Zeconic
